title: cephalocarpus maguireanus
intro: Cephalocarpus maguireanus, a species of flowering plant in the family Cephalotaceae, is native to New Guinea. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Cephalocarpus maguireanus include the relief of pain and inflammation, as well as the treatment of wounds and infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction for its medicinal uses.
